build._comment_: Three profiles in increasing degrees of polish: development (dev-client for hot reload on a real device), preview (installable APK + simulator build for QA on a real phone without a debug bundler), production (store-bound aab + ipa). Channel maps to runtime updates so each profile pulls a separate OTA stream.

preview._comment_: Real-device QA target. Distribution=internal gives a hosted install URL + QR code; no Play Store / TestFlight review needed. Android builds an APK (sideloadable). iOS builds an .ipa that registered UDIDs can install via Expo's install link (you'll be prompted to register a device the first time).

production._comment_: Store-bound. Android emits an .aab for Play Store internal track upload; iOS emits an .ipa pushed to TestFlight via the EAS Submit flow. Auto-increment lets EAS bump versionCode / buildNumber each time so the store doesn't reject duplicate uploads.

submit._comment_: `eas submit -p ios` / `-p android` after a production build uploads to App Store Connect / Play Console. Credentials prompted interactively on first run, then cached on EAS servers. Leave the appleId / ascAppId blank here so the CLI prompts on demand — safer than committing identifiers.
